removedNoBridge.net/minecraft/world/WorldType: Custom world types were removed in 1.16 (no redirect exists).

knownIncompatible.name: Create
knownIncompatible.reason: Ships Flywheel, a custom GL renderer plus coremods; deep-integration, cannot be translated.

knownIncompatible.name: Flywheel
knownIncompatible.reason: A custom instanced-rendering engine; cannot be translated.

knownIncompatible.name: Veil
knownIncompatible.reason: A custom rendering framework (custom pipeline); cannot be translated.

knownIncompatible.name: Sable
knownIncompatible.reason: Built on Veil, so it inherits Veil's custom-pipeline incompatibility.

knownIncompatible.name: OptiFine
knownIncompatible.reason: Wraps MC's rendering at a level that does not translate.

knownIncompatible.name: ImmediatelyFast
knownIncompatible.reason: A rendering-pipeline replacement; wraps rendering at a level that does not translate.
